title: gentiana septemfida subsp. overinii
intro: Gentiana septemfida subsp. overinii, also known as Overin's gentian, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the gentian family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, Overin's gentian is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
